overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character running continuously through urban Los Santos, transitioning from under a highway overpass through commercial districts past LS Customs, and continuing through a plaza area with a classical courthouse building.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with concrete retaining walls

events.description: character exits the covered overpass into bright open sunlight

agents.ego_description: running steadily under the highway overpass toward the light at the tunnel exit

entered.detail: concrete highway overpass creating a covered tunnel effect with visible support beams
tall concrete wall with graffiti running along the right side of the sidewalk
multi-lane city street with vehicles passing by on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a dimly lit highway underpass with concrete walls and ceiling, vehicles passing on the adjacent road. The environment transitions from shadow to light as the character approaches the open end of the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with retail buildings and pedestrians

events.description: emerging from shadow of overpass into full bright sunlight
passing a person in a wheelchair sitting on a bench

agents.ego_description: running along the sidewalk past the distinctive red commercial building and various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in wheelchair sitting on a bench near the building wall

entered.detail: bright red multi-story commercial building with large glass windows and white trim
metal chain-link fence running along the property boundary behind the red building
wooden bench with metal frame positioned against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into bright sunlight along a commercial sidewalk dominated by a vivid red building on the right. Pedestrians appear, including a person in a wheelchair on a bench. The environment shifts from the enclosed overpass to an open urban street with trees and parked cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with auto shop and pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: approaching and entering crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
reaching the opposite sidewalk near the LS Customs automotive shop

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk while running, then continuing along the sidewalk past LS Customs

notable_agents.action: black sports car waiting at the intersection for the pedestrian to cross

entered.detail: automotive customization shop with distinctive yellow LS logo signage on the facade
tall palm tree situated on the sidewalk median near the crosswalk
standard traffic signal mounted on a tall metal pole at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a busy intersection at the crosswalk, passing a waiting black sports car, and arrives at the LS Customs automotive shop. The area features a distinctive palm tree and modern glass buildings, with moderate pedestrian activity on the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with classical courthouse and modern office buildings

events.description: crossing another wide intersection with the classical courthouse visible on the left
entering a covered area under a modern building overhang

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection in front of the courthouse, then running along the plaza sidewalk under building overhangs

notable_agents.action: man in striped shirt walking in the plaza area near the courthouse

entered.detail: large neoclassical municipal building with tall stone columns and grand facade
metal grid-style bench situated in the open plaza area
covered walkway under the modern office building creating shade on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide intersection with a prominent classical courthouse on the left, then continues through an open plaza area with benches and scattered pedestrians. The segment ends as the character runs under the overhang of a modern building, entering a shaded covered walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a city landscape that transforms from a dim concrete underpass into a bright, open urban plaza. It begins in the shadows of a highway overpass with concrete walls and passing vehicles, moving steadily forward as the environment transitions from darkness into brilliant sunlight. As the character emerges onto a commercial sidewalk, the scene opens up to reveal a vivid red building and pedestrians resting on benches before shifting toward a busy intersection. The camera then glides past a black sports car and the glass facade of LS Customs, passing under palm trees as the urban density increases. Finally, the view expands across a wide intersection featuring a classical courthouse and an open plaza with scattered pedestrians, before turning into the shade of a modern building's covered walkway.
